rationale: Educ. Code §48.252 governs entitlements for certain charter-partnership campuses based on ADA funding differences. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: a school district subject to this section is entitled to receive for each student in average daily attendance at the campus or program described by Subsection (a) an amount equivalent to the difference
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemption values in this section.
